---
title: "Burnt Out: A Story for Mothers’ Meetings."
---

## Burnt Out: A Story for Mothers’ Meetings.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1879
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** Walter Smith (late Mozley), 6 Paternoster Row, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
